name: LessonQuiz
goal: Run a multiple-choice quiz — either a single attribute-driven question with instant feedback, or a slotted batch of <lesson-question> children with one CDR-004 interactive opt-in.
description: Two-shape multiple-choice quiz. In the single-question shape, set question/options/correct/explanation; clicking an option marks it green if correct or red if wrong (and outlines the correct one), shows the explanation, and disables the rest. lesson-quiz-answer fires once. In the container shape, leave question empty and slot one or more <lesson-question> children; each manages its own answer state via lesson-question-answer. Setting interactive on the quiz cascades the attribute to every direct <lesson-question> child so a whole batch can be opted in with one attribute (CDR-004). The container attribute auto-reflects when question is empty and drops the panel chrome so the questions provide their own framing.

props.name: correct
props.description: Index of the correct option in options.

props.name: explanation
props.description: Shown after the user picks (single-question shape only).

props.name: interactive
props.description: Container-shape CDR-004 opt-in: cascades the interactive attribute to every direct <lesson-question> child. Has no effect in single-question shape (the attribute-driven quiz is always clickable by definition).

props.name: container
props.description: Auto-reflected when question is empty. Drops the outer panel chrome so slotted <lesson-question> children provide their own framing. Authors do not usually set this directly.

events.name: lesson-quiz-answer
events.description: Fires once when the user picks; detail.correct indicates whether the pick matched correct.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Clears the picked state so the quiz can be retaken.

slots.description: Container-shape only. Slot <lesson-question> children (and any inline narrative HTML) when question is empty. The single-question shape renders its own UI and ignores slotted content.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-4
cssVariables.description: Outer vertical padding + option horizontal padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Outer vertical margin + question bottom margin + explanation top spacing.

sideEffects.description: Tracks the picked option index in component state.
sideEffects.reason: Required to render the post-answer UI and prevent re-answering.

interchangeableWith.when: single-question or container shape with rounds/questions that share the same prompt+options+correct shape

nondeterministicReason: state side effect prevents byte-identical innerHTML across runs
